common.tagline: Your travel story, one pin at a time

saveDestination.title: Pin a destination
saveDestination.subtitle: Pin cities, countries, and parks.
saveDestination.customCityPrompt: Add {name} to your map. Pick a country.
saveDestination.customParkPrompt: Add {name} to your map. Pick country and type.
saveDestination.addCountryFirst: Add a country to your map first, or include a country name in your search.

home.hero: Pin your travels. Share with friends.
home.heroHeadline: Turn your journeys into a map you can share.
home.heroDescription: Mark the countries you've visited, pin your favorite cities, save memories, and build a wishlist for future trips — all in one beautiful travel profile.
home.desktopPanelSubtitle: Pin the countries, cities, parks, and places you have visited. Keep your travel history in one simple profile.
home.explainerTitle: Explore {name}'s map, then create your own.
home.explainerBody: {name} has mapped {countries} countries and {cities} cities, with pinned places, travel memories, and destinations she wants to visit next.
home.featuresSectionTitle: Everything about your travels, in one place.
home.featuresSectionSubtitle: TravelerPin is more than a checklist. It is a personal archive of where you have been, what you remember, and where you want to go next.
home.finalCtaTitle: Start building your travel map today.
home.finalCtaBody: Create your profile in minutes, add your first countries, pin your favorite cities, and share your travel story with one link.

bestDestinations.title: Best travel destinations
bestDestinations.subtitle: Explore popular countries, cities, and places people often add to their travel maps.

home.subtitle: Tap a country to explore the sample map. Sign up when you're ready to build and share your own.
home.demoTravelerStory: {name} has visited {countries} countries and {cities} cities and pinned them.
home.createYourMap: Create your own travel map and pin too.
home.yourMap: Your travel map — tap a country to view your memories.
home.ctaHint: Free account · One photo or Instagram post per city · Share with one link
home.featuresTitle: Your travel map in three parts

map.title: Map your world
map.description: Mark visited countries, pin cities, and keep track of the places still on your list.

remember.title: Keep the memories
remember.description: Add photos, Instagram posts, notes, and personal moments to the places you visited.

share.title: Share your profile
share.description: Get one clean public link with your map, stats, pins, badges, and travel story.

countryHub.removePlacesFirst: To delete a country, you first need to delete any cities or parks you've added to that country.
countryHub.recentTravelers: Recent travelers who pinned this country
countryHub.noTravelersYet: No one has pinned this country yet.
countryHub.pinCountry: Be the first to pin it
countryHub.noTravelersPinned: No travelers have pinned this country yet

cityHub.noTravelersPinned: No travelers have pinned this city yet

parkHub.noTravelersPinned: No travelers have pinned this park yet

auth.usernameInvalid: Use 3–30 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only

profile.visitorIntro: {name} pinned their travels and shared them. You can create and share your travel map too.
profile.repeatVisitsBoth: visited {countries} countries and {cities} cities many times.
profile.travelDiarySubtitle: Collect the places you've been and share how your map grows over time.
profile.travelUpdateSubtitle: Your travel map has grown since your last share.
profile.travelUpdateShareSubtitle: Download a share card with your current map and stats, and share it on your social media.
profile.travelUpdateImageHint: Download a square or story image, or share your progress with one tap.
profile.tripDefaultNote: A pinned stop on the travel map.
profile.summaryTopVisitEmpty: Add cities to see your most active location.
profile.summaryTopVisitBody: {city} is the most active location on this profile.
profile.summaryTopVisitSuffix: is the most active location on this profile.
profile.summaryNextRouteEmpty: Add countries to your wishlist for upcoming routes.
profile.summaryCountriesBody: {count} different countries are marked on the map.
profile.summaryFavoritesEmpty: Cities visited more than once will show up here.
profile.summaryFavoritesBody: {count} cities have been visited more than once.
profile.ownerEmptyCountries: No countries yet. Tap Add to search and mark visited or want-to-visit.
profile.ownerEmptyCities: No cities yet. Tap Add to pin your first city.
profile.ownerEmptyParks: No parks yet. Tap Add to pin your first park.
profile.allDestinationsEmpty: No destinations on this map yet.

destinations.title: Popular destinations
destinations.hint: Tap a city to add it in one step. Tap − to remove.

country.title: Countries
country.name: Country
country.toggleHint: Search a country and check Visited or Want to add it to your map.
country.searchIdle: Search for a country, or see your selected countries below when the search is empty.
country.lockedViaPlaces: To delete a country, you first need to delete any cities or parks you've added to that country.
country.removePlacesFirst: To delete a country, you first need to delete any cities or parks you've added to that country.
country.empty: No countries yet. Add the first country you've visited.
country.allAdded: Every country is already on your map.

city.title: Cities
city.addCountryFirst: Add a country first, then pin your cities on the map.
city.empty: No cities yet. Add a pin to share a memory.
city.noCitiesInCountry: No cities in this country yet.
city.notePlaceholder: Your impressions, memories, or tips (max 1000 characters)
city.instagramHint: Paste a standard Instagram post URL — we'll embed it when visitors open this pin
city.mediaHint: One photo OR one Instagram link per city — not both
city.locationHint: We place the pin automatically from the city and country you enter.
city.noCityResults: No places found. Try a different spelling or add the city by name.
city.searchHint: Search cities in the countries on your map.
city.searchIdle: Type a city name to search.
city.pickCityFirst: Search and pick a city from the list, or add your own by name.
city.customCityNotFoundInCountry: {city} was not found in {country}. Add it?
city.visitDatesHint: Month and year — optional. Use the link below if you visited more than once.
city.visitDatesPickCityFirst: Pick a city from search results. If it's already on your map, tap it — edit opens to add dates.
city.alreadyOnMapEdit: On your map · tap to add dates
city.alreadyOnMapEditHint: This city is already on your map. Use Edit in the list to add visit dates.
city.visitDatePrompt: Would you like to add when you visited?

park.title: Parks
park.addCountryFirst: Add a country first, then add parks from your dashboard.
park.empty: No parks yet. Add national parks, theme parks, or botanical gardens you've visited.
park.noParksInCountry: No parks in this country yet.
park.pickParkFirst: Search and pick a park from the list, or add your own by name.
park.noParkResults: No parks found. Try a different spelling or add the park by name.
park.customParkNotFoundInCountry: {park} was not found in {country}. Add it?

map.exploreHint: Drag to pan · Scroll to zoom · Double-click to reset · Tap a country
map.demoExploreHint: Choose a continent, search a country, or add a popular destination · Drag to pan · Scroll to zoom · Tap a country
map.countryEmpty: No travel memories on the map for this country yet.
map.loginToMark: Sign in or create an account to save to your map.
map.pickCitiesHint: Pick popular destinations or type a name to add your own city.
map.customCityNotFoundInCountry: {city} was not found in {country}. Add it?
map.pickParksHint: National parks and theme parks (including botanical gardens) — separate from cities.
map.customParkNotFoundInCountry: {park} was not found in {country}. Add it?

share.hint: Share the link — WhatsApp, Telegram, and social apps will show a preview card with the travel map.

modal.deleteCityMessage: Remove this city from your map?
modal.deleteParkMessage: Remove this park from your map?
modal.deleteCountryMessage: Remove this country from your map?
modal.deleteWishlistCountryMessage: Remove this country from your wishlist?

settings.title: Profile Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize how you appear on your public travel page.
settings.photoHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP — up to 5 MB
settings.shareHint: Share your map with friends and on social media using this link.
settings.bioPlaceholder: A short intro for visitors to your travel map…
settings.logoutHint: Sign out of TravelerPin on this device.

wishlist.title: Want to visit
wishlist.name: Country
wishlist.empty: No countries on your wishlist yet.
wishlist.allAdded: Every country is already on your map or wishlist.
wishlist.settingsHint: Control what visitors see on your public profile.
wishlist.publicLabel: Show wishlist on my public profile
wishlist.publicHint: When enabled, visitors see wishlist countries on your map. When off, only visited countries appear on the map. Your repeat-visit summary on your profile is always shown.
